ABU.name: ABU
ABU.description: ABU（ABUniverse）成立于 2009 年，是 ABDL 圈最有影响力的纸尿裤品牌之一。旗下产品以定位印花（Landing Zone 印花）、超厚吸收芯、4-Tape 魔术贴结构和「胖宝宝友好」的剪裁著称。ABU 在澳大利亚、欧洲、北美都有独立站点。

REARZ.name: REARZ
REARZ.description: Rearz Inc. 总部位于加拿大，专注 ABDL 用品与高吸收成人尿裤。其明星系列包括 Daydreamer（梦境）、Safari（野游）、Princess Pink（公主粉）、Critter Caboose（动物列车）等。Rearz 在高吸收（11,000ml+）和图案创意方面有口皆碑，包装上常带清新香味。

abu-alphagatorz.name: AlphaGatorZ
abu-alphagatorz.description_en: Keep Your Little Learner Covered From A to Z! Croccy the AlphaGator will help you learn your A-B-3's and 1-2-C's in no time! Croccy takes the lead in this fun design full of numbers, shapes & letters; all the important stuff every tremendous tot has been learning about! This comfy cloth-backed diaper features four extra-grippy “Adjust-All-Day” hook & loop tapes to keep the diaper snug on even the most active kiddo! Combined with our super-absorbent core, even the biggest sogg monsters will be kept at bay, all day. Our classically cool, adorable art and cutting-edge printing technology brings you a complete front-to-back diaper full of cutesy, crinkly details, hitting the little feels of even the biggest waddler! Science has never been soggier… Class has never been cooler… Introducing AlphaGatorZ (and Croccy!), one of ABU's NEW Positional Printed Diapers. Positional printing is a crazy-hi-tech crinkly advancement that turns diapers into a canvas of precision design. Using fancy sensors and science-y stuff, Positional Printed Diapers mean we can print what we want, where we want. It's the small details that make a big difference. We have just opened up a whole new world of diaper design. To learn more about this exciting new diaper feature, check out our article here: Positional Printed Diapers - What Are They? With no need to worry about pesky potty breaks, you'll be top of the class and know those A-B-Cs by the count of 1-2-3! Our newest product gives the littles of the world the confidence that one day they will be a 'big kid' too; no matter how much fun they're having in diapers!

abu-bunnyhopps-4-tape.name: BunnyHopps 4-Tape
abu-bunnyhopps-4-tape.description_en: Bunnies Dream in Pink! A diaper designed for the prettiest little inside all of us, ABUniverse is delighted to present a pleasant provision of pristinely pink padding promoting a particularly appealing pastel palette. Deserving no less than a properly planned introduction, it’s ABU BunnyHopps 4-Tape Edition! Lightly colored pink bunnies blanket this soft-hued diaper, accented by day and nighttime inspired landing zones. Prancing about in this lovely pastel padding is sure to be effortlessly snug and comfortable, and thanks to our very own hook and loop closures, they’ll stay put too! With a bit of adorable bunny dreams and some magical help, these superbly cute diapers are sure to fulfill anyone’s prettiest pink desire!

abu-dinorawrz.name: DinoRawrZ
abu-dinorawrz.description_en: Crinkle-taceous Fun With Dino Friends! Hidden within the cold and forgotten shelves of the ABU idea vault resides an ancient crinkle so cute, so comfy, we were unable to let it remain extinct forever! Presenting ABU DinoRawrZ! Meet the ABU DinoRawrZ gang, Skyler, Ty, Rain, Misty, and Brock; five cuddly cute dino friends parading over our new Hook and Loop diaper featuring a unique landing zone for each character! Our prehistoric find takes everyone back to a land before the worries of leaks, and a time before faulty sticky tapes to the land of DinoRawrZ, where practical play meets padded fun. With a pair of super strong hook and loop closures, these diapers were made to stay put, ensuring your adult diaper stays where it needs to be. Now everyone can enjoy an anciently cute crinkle!

abu-little-kings.name: Little Kings
abu-little-kings.description_en: A Japanese Inspired Diaper Made To Pamper The Little Royalty In Your Life! From Japan with love, ABU introduces an all-new diaper featuring some maw-dropping new technology that is sure to have you pouncing on this precious padding! Working with our local team over at ABU Japan, we have designed Little Kings; the first ABDL Positionally Printed Diaper, giving it a personal touch of Japanese influence we hope you'll love. What makes Little Kings the leader of its pride? Aside from its soft, cloth-like backing, four hook & loop tapes, quick-absorb core & amazing 7500ml absorbency; Little Kings features new Positional Printed Backsheets! Until now, the standard for making ABDL patterns on diapers has been a printed tape panel or repeating backsheet. With Positional Printed diapers, we can print what we want, where we want; turning the diaper into a canvas ready to design from top to bottom! It's a small detail that makes a big difference; opening up a whole new world of opportunity with diaper designs. To learn more about this exciting new diaper feature check out our article here: Positional Printed Diapers - What Are They? Make way as a new king of crinkles roars its way onto the ABDL scene with Little Kings! Experience being pampered like royalty in our poofiest cloth backed-diaper ever & return to the blissful comfort of nostalgic little feels with this unique design. Join the ABU Pride today with Little Kings!

abu-littlepawz.name: LittlePawz
abu-littlepawz.description_en: Adorably Padded Animal Characters with “Fade When Wet” Paw Prints! For the little animal in all of us, ABU presents the super fluffy-cute Little Pawz diapers! Whether you’re active and scruffy, or playful and primed for a show, this diaper has something for everyone who’s a fan of cute and fuzzy critters. Green and blue plaid accessory print surround playful-padded animal characters and toys for an all-over print made with cutie pups in mind! Featuring a pawprint wetness indicator and super awesome 5500ml capacity, mommies and daddies will have the ease of checking their little scamp on the fly, letting change time not get in the way of play time. Don’t wait, get your little pup pampered in more ways than one today!

abu-oops-all-huskies.name: Oops All Huskies
abu-oops-all-huskies.description_en: The PeekABU Husky Takeover! Some pups just can’t help themselves… and this time, our sneaky PeekABU Husky has gone TOO FAR! Introducing “PeekABU Oops! All Huskies”—a limited-edition version of our high-performance diaper, PeekABU! In this special run, the mischievous Husky has kicked out the rest of the PeekABU gang, filling every single diaper in the pack with just him! Features: 7500ml absorbency – All day or all night, PeekABU has you covered! Soft, crinkly plastic shell – The same PeekABU feel you love! Slimmer, lighter design – Perfect for all-day comfort! Super-strong tapes – Holds up against even the rowdiest pups! This is a limited-edition run - once they’re gone, they’re GONE! Don’t miss out on this mischievous ABDL must-have, and join the waitlist now!

abu-peekabu.name: PeekABU
abu-peekabu.description_en: Adorably-Shy Friends On Our Most Absorbent Diaper Ever! Peekaboo! I see you! Some babies are a little bit shy, and we think that’s super cute, so we just had to put a little bit of that adorable shyness on our brand new ultra-premium diaper. ABU is proud to present PeekABU, a diaper that is so adorable and absorbent you’ll always have a smile and stay dry longer! Shy and ultra-cute animal characters make a big appearance on PeekABU’s landing zone, just at the right height to peek over and say hello! With a newly designed diaper shell featuring a thinner and lighter construction, super quick-absorb core, never give up tapes, and amazing 7500ml capacity, your worry days for diapers that can’t keep up with you are over! *This diaper WILL cause waddling when decently wet!

abu-simple-daytime.name: Simple Daytime
abu-simple-daytime.description_en: Simple Daytime – A Classic, Reinvented for Every Day Introducing Simple Daytime, the next evolution of ABU’s classic all-white Simple diaper. Designed with modern performance in mind and built to handle your busiest, most padded days, Simple Daytime offers all the features you need without the fuss. This isn’t just another plain diaper. It’s a purpose-built daily diaper with: ✨ A 5,500ml absorbency 💪 Four ultra-strong hook & loop tapes 🛡️ Tall standing leak guards 🌊 Dual wetness indicator strips 🧷 A soft, smooth plastic shell for all-day comfort Whether you’re on the move, tucked in for a nap, or just want a diaper that fits seamlessly into your everyday routine, Simple Daytime has you covered. Want extra peace of mind? Pair it with your favorite booster for all-day (or all-night!) comfort. Because sometimes, Simple is exactly what you need.

abu-simple-ultra.name: Simple Ultra
abu-simple-ultra.description_en: Doing a LOT More With Less! Ultra-Simple, that’s what we wanted to bring back with ABU’s new and improved Simple Ultra diaper design. And we’re keeping it simple, letting diaper lovers of all ages put their own spin and style on the diapers they wear with stickers or keep it classy for an old-school, all-white, vintage look. Just like our newest, and probably shyest diaper ever, PeekABUs, these all-white, plastic-backed diapers pack some Ultra-impressive perks! Over 7500ml capacity, super grip tapes, and a slimmer, lighter design will keep you dry when it counts and last longer than those other “ultra” diapers. Simply put, these are ultra-awesome diapers and we made them just for you!

abu-super-dry-kids.name: Super Dry Kids
abu-super-dry-kids.description_en: Welcome Back to a Classic Look and Feel, Weren’t You Getting Out of These Not Long Ago?? They say the classics never get old, and we think so too! We put a vintage spin on our Super Dry Kids diapers to back that old saying up! ABU’s Super Dry Kids diapers is a vintage throwback to the good-old-days when all-over white, cute designs, and crinkly plastic were standard for all. Featuring a super strong two-tape design; adorable, 90’s inspired landing zone; and quick-absorb 4500mL core, your searching for a super awesome, classically vintage baby diaper look are now over!

abu-tinytails.name: TinyTails
abu-tinytails.description_en: ABU's Balloon Buddies Soar High In Our Fuzziest Release Yet, TinyTails! ABU is proud to present our newest release, a furry themed diaper like never before! We went all out on this one, no ifs, ands or buts about it. We’ve got a Plastic-Backed Positional Printed Diaper overflowing with balloons, rainbows and fuzzy delights sure to tickle your tummy with joy. ABU’s TinyTails Diapers are now shipping!! TinyTails new All-Over Bag-Wrap will make you feel even more little when opening your adorable adult diapers! A bag designed with details and games, sure to push buttons when perusing your closet and seeing a rainbow burst of crinkly delight staring back at you. TinyTails is designed by Aito, one of ABU's Furry artists and the creator of another beloved diaper that has worked its peeking faces into the community's hearts, PeekABU! We are pleased to present a colorful canvas of fuzzy glee we hope will bring out the little cub in all of you! TinyTails diapers have now arrived and are heading out the door. We can’t wait to get your cute little bottoms, fuzzy or otherwise; wrapped up in ABU's first Plastic Backed Positional Printed Diaper, complete with our first ever, immersive, All-Over Bag Wrap design. Wanna learn more about the awesome potential of Positional Printing? Click Here to check out our article from when we revealed it to the world with Little Kings and AlphaGatorZ As well as presenting a brilliant bunch of cute new critters to the community, TinyTails continues ABU’s mission to innovate and develop the worlds best diapers for crinklebutts everywhere. TinyTails is based on our most inclusive chassis, fitting just like LittlePawz and Space, but with some awesome enhancements. A new soft plastic specifically selected for it's texture to evoke a sense of calm. This alongside an incredible boosted core with 7,500ml capacity and quick wicking ADL, to keep the sogg monsters under control! We also have our the tallest leak guards ever! Little leaks don't stand a chance with these cloudy diapers that are as absorbent as they are poofy!

reviews.body: ALWAY HAPPY WITH YOUR PRODUCTS

rearz-baby-girl-mixed-case.description_cn: 准备好迎接神奇的冒险吧！我们为 ABDL 公主们准备的终极混合装已经到来——满满一箱都是皇室级别的好东西。让这套装备带你进入一个充满可爱粉色印花和高吸收纸尿裤的梦幻世界。

rearz-bedry-elitecare.name: InControl BeDry EliteCare
rearz-bedry-elitecare.description_en: The ultimate solution for daytime and nighttime incontinence needs - BeDry EliteCare ! BeDry EliteCare features our game-changing Whiff-X Technology , a powerful hypoallergenic triple-action core that: Locks in liquid to keep skin dry. Eliminates bacteria and keeps skin healthier. Neutralizes odours during and even after use. Thanks to our extensive research and testing, we have ensured that BeDry EliteCare redefines the standards for disposable adult diapers. Its rapid-absorbing core and Whiff-X technology delivers peace of mind and comfort, making it a reliable choice for those managing incontinence in their daily life. Key Features: 12 hours of leak protection 10 L capacity Extra soft and smooth waterproof plastic outer layer Whiff-X technology for advanced odour control, bacteria elimination, and keeping skin dry Versatile solution suitable for both daytime and nighttime use Available in Small to XL Sizes, ensuring a perfect fit for all users Taping guide for easy application Tall standing leak guards for extra protection Front and back elastic waistbands for a secure fit Hook and loop style fasteners offer unlimited adjustments, ensuring a customized and secure fit, whether applied by oneself or a caregiver Reinforced frontal panel for enhanced durability Rapid absorbing core for maximum leak protection 2 diapers per sample, 12 diapers per bag, 3 bags per case (36 diapers) Experience elite incontinence care with BeDry EliteCare. Try it today and feel more confident than ever! #BeDryStayDry *Note: ISO absorbency is a theoretical max capacity. In the assessment of the ideal moment for changing diapers, users are advised to consider the duration of wear, the level of comfort, and the preservation of skin health. It is crucial to recognize that reaching the maximum capacity may not be feasible in real-world usage situations. InControl conducts rigorous testing to guarantee uniform absorbency, sizing, and functionality throughout our entire product range, thereby ensuring an optimal experience for our valued customers.

reviews.author: Robert
reviews.body: This is an excellent diaper. I've used BeDry Premium for years, for overnight issues. A friend recommended trying BeDry EliteCare Premium. I took his advice, and this diaper has been great. I've used it for overnight issues, and daytime issues when I know restrooms will not be accessible. I typically don't like hook and loop fasteners, however, these work great. If you haven't given them a try yet, you won't be disappointed.

reviews.author: Shar
reviews.body: These diapers are great! Fit nicely. They don’t leak and these keeps you dry!

reviews.author: Blake
reviews.body:
One thing you will like, besides their great dependability, is having the choice with the hook and loop tapes so you can adjust for whatever reason.
These are highly dependable in that you can go about your day without any worries because they hold up to their reputation for being a great garment/diaper. They are cut very well, so they fit very well, with no clumps or leaks. They keep their shape.

rearz-bedry-elitecare.description_cn: 日间和夜间失禁护理的终极解决方案——BeDry EliteCare！采用革命性的 Whiff-X 技术，一种强效低过敏三重作用芯体，能在几秒内吸收湿气、中和异味，并防止回渗长达 12 小时。

rearz-bedry-night.name: InControl BeDry Night
rearz-bedry-night.description_en: Upgrade to the highest standard in nighttime incontinence protection with BeDry Night adult diapers! Offering over 12 hours of leak resistance and an extra thick, rapid-absorbing core for maximum leak protection, BeDry Night stands out by delivering high performance during sleep without compromising on comfort, discretion and confidence. BeDry Night features a new level of comfort and freshness with revolutionary Whiff-X technology , a powerful hypoallergenic triple-action core that: Locks in liquid to keep skin dry. Eliminates bacteria, so skin stays healthy. Neutralizes odours during and after use, for freshness and confidence. The refastenable tapes, reinforced landing zone, and easy-to-use fastening guide makes this a perfect fit for self-applicators and caregivers. Key Features: 12 hours of leak protection 12 L capacity Extra soft and smooth waterproof plastic outer layer Whiff-X technology for advanced odour control Taping guide for easy application Tall standing leak guards for extra protection Front and back elastic waistbands for a secure fit Hook and loop style fasteners allowing for an unlimited number of adjustments for added convenience Reinforced frontal panel for enhanced durability Rapid absorbing core for maximum leak protection 2 diapers per sample, 12 diapers per bag, 3 bags per case (36 diapers) Keep your sheets dry with the incredible absorbency of BeDry Night. Try it today and feel the difference yourself! #BeDryStayDry *Note: ISO absorbency is a theoretical max capacity. In the assessment of the ideal moment for changing diapers, users are advised to consider the duration of wear, the level of comfort, and the preservation of skin health. It is crucial to recognize that reaching the maximum capacity may not be feasible in real-world usage situations. InControl conducts rigorous testing to guarantee uniform absorbency, sizing, and functionality throughout our entire product range, thereby ensuring an optimal experience for our valued customers.

reviews.author: Steven
reviews.body: While I prefer sticky tape, I tried a case of these and was surprised at the strength ans large size of the velcro type. It was wider and stronger that I though and yes a superior diaper.No Leaks!

reviews.author: Johnny S
reviews.body: It's  been 4 1/ 2 months since I had to go back to using  diapers for day time use. I've  always used a night. I've  only had one diaper  leak, but it's  because I I fell asleep  and didn't get to change my diaper. I've  been in  and out of the Hospital  several  times  and still wary them in there. The hospital ones just don't  hold more than one wetting, before it starts to leak. I wish they would  make them with 6 tapes to get a more tight and secure fit.I will be ordering  more.

reviews.author: Johnny S
reviews.body: I thought I made a mistake when I got these. I thought I was ordering the incontrol with the tapes, not the hook and loop.The hook and loop are working great, haven't had a problem yet.Had to go to the ER before I could change to a dry diaper,  once in a room I had to put a gown on with the nurses help. She made a comment about how full it was. She help change me me into a clean one, and made a comment about how soft they felt. I felt a little embarrassed,  but she asked where I got them from. I told her rearz.com These are the best diapers I have worn and hold alot. No leaks yet

rearz-bedry-night.description_cn: 升级到夜间失禁护理的最高标准——BeDry Night 成人纸尿裤！提供超过 12 小时的防漏保护和超厚快速吸收芯体。采用柔软的布感背板设计，配有弹性腰围和四片式魔术贴，确保完美贴合。

rearz-bedry-ultra-premium-underwear.name: BeDry Ultra Premium Underwear
rearz-bedry-ultra-premium-underwear.description_en: Discreet, absorbent, and comfortable—our heavy incontinence underwear redefines everyday protection! BeDry Ultra Premium Underwear is latex free and designed to feel just like regular underwear while offering the highest level of protection against leaks. In fact, the soft inner cuffs prevent side leaks and the absorbent core includes our innovative Whiff-X Technology , which is a powerful hypoallergenic triple-action core that: Locks in liquid to keep skin dry. Eliminates bacteria, so your skin stays healthier. Neutralizes odours during and even after use. Changing is a breeze with the tear-open seams . Blue inner elastics indicate the front of the product. Experience the unparalleled comfort and protection of BeDry Ultra Premium Underwear today and feel the difference! 2 underwear per sample, 12 underwear per bag, 8 bags per case (96) *Note: ISO absorbency is a theoretical max capacity. In the assessment of the ideal moment for changing diapers, users are advised to consider the duration of wear, the level of comfort, and the preservation of skin health. It is crucial to recognize that reaching the maximum capacity may not be feasible in real-world usage situations. InControl conducts rigorous testing to guarantee uniform absorbency, sizing, and functionality throughout our entire product range, thereby ensuring an optimal experience for our valued customers.

reviews.author: Marion
reviews.body: I bought these for my mother.  I really like the fit on her, as she is between sizes.  Bought the L/XL.  I have found that they are quite absorbent and have not noticed any leakage.  Even at night.   They don’t hold stool well but I haven’t found any that do.  You can see them through her clothes but she finds them comfortable and that’s what matters!!  I find them a bit on the pricey side but am willing to pay for the comfort and efficiency!  Good product!!!  Will be buying again!!!

reviews.author: David
reviews.body: I  had given up on pullups until InControl  introduced these. They are more absorbent than  other  pullups I have tried and are very comfortable. Just the thing for hot summer days. Be nice if they were available in colours  other than white.

reviews.author: David
reviews.body: I used to hate pull up diapers as they often leaked and were just generally uncomfortable, but these have changed my mind. They are very comfortable and soft and they don't feel wet all the time. Even when they are nearly full they feel dry. I have also not experienced leaks with these (unless I just waited too long to change) these are about as close to the protection of a tape on diaper you will ever get from a pull up diaper.

rearz-bedry-ultra-premium-underwear.description_cn: 隐蔽、吸收、舒适——我们的重度失禁内裤重新定义了日常保护！BeDry Ultra Premium 内裤不含乳胶，设计得就像普通内裤一样，同时提供最高级别的防漏保护。柔软的内侧防漏边和 Whiff-X 技术确保你全天干爽自信。

rearz-bunnyboo-adult-diapers.name: Bunny Boo
rearz-bunnyboo-adult-diapers.description_en: Meet Bunny Boo, one of our most absorbent briefs with a 12L capacity, perfect for nighttime wear and heavy incontinence. Featuring a printed frontal tape with an adorable bunny design and a light bubblegum scent, this sweet spring-inspired brief is made for those who love a touch of kawaii charm and all the cozy Easter vibes with its protection. The diaper features a soft turquoise plastic backing that captures the fresh, playful spirit of spring. But it's not just about looks, Bunny Boo is designed to ensure maximum comfort with a thicker and fluffier core, providing hop-around-the-clock protection. Whether you're out enjoying the warmer weather, having a cozy day at home, or hunting for your next adventure, Bunny Boo briefs promise to keep you dry and comfortable for longer. Bunny Boo is a limited-edition release, shining bright for only a short time! Don't miss your chance to grab these before they hop away! For additional information regarding diapers and their features, click here to check out our Diaper Guide

reviews.author: Harmony C.
reviews.body:
I absolutely love these diapers. 
They are very absorbent and very comfortable.

reviews.author: Harmony
reviews.body:
The softest and most absorbent diaper I have ever experienced. 
My new favorite.

reviews.author: David
reviews.body: Love how they fit. They’re cute, comfy, holds up very well, and absorb a lot. The scent is subtle (I’d prefer something a little more pronounced), and they’re quiet. They swell up nicely. It’s a shame they’re limited time! Definitely would order more

rearz-bunnyboo-adult-diapers.description_cn: 认识 Bunny Boo，我们吸收能力最强的纸尿裤之一，容量达 12 升，非常适合夜间穿着和重度失禁护理。采用可爱的兔子印花前贴和淡淡的泡泡糖香味，这款甜美春季风格的纸尿裤专为喜欢可爱魅力的人设计。

rearz-classic-mixed-case.description_en: This mixed case is all about the classics! You'll get three of our most enduring products: the clean and simple Inspire+ in pure white, the Safari print (one of our originals!), and Princess Pink—our first feminine design, now with a fresh update. Perfect for long-time Rearz fans who want to stock up on the favorites that started it all. For additional information regarding diapers and their features, click here to check out our Diaper Guide
rearz-classic-mixed-case.description_cn: 这套混合装全是经典款！你会得到三款我们最受欢迎的产品：纯净白色的 Inspire+、Safari 印花（我们的原创之一！）和 Princess Pink——我们首款女性化设计，现在有了全新更新。

rearz-daydreamer-adult-diapers-2xl.name: Daydreamer Adult Diapers
rearz-daydreamer-adult-diapers-2xl.description_en: Daydreamer incontinence diapers now available in 2XL! Crafted with stretchable hook and loop tabs, these diapers offer the utmost comfort and convenience, making them our largest size disposable yet for managing your needs. Drift-off into blissful sleep with the Daydreamer mega nighttime brief. In a sky painted with shades of pink and blue, there's a special place where daydreams come true. Fluffy clouds in a dance, with rainbows and paper airplanes taking a chance. Birds sing their melodies and kites zig-zag by. In the middle of this enchanting sight, there are six little mice ready to take flight. They are the Daydreamer Mice, each one unique: Amelia , brave and true, Scout , swift and keen, Finn , loving and playful, Brie , happy and fun, Skipper , the life of the party and last but not least Willow , the softest and shyest of all the mice. A super smooth, clear plastic backing, makes this the first diaper to have a natural wetness indicator. The more you use the product the more noticeable it gets. Perfect for those looking for a diaper that caregivers can instantly see when you're ready for a change. Comfort is king with the Daydreamer diapers, our thick padding and highest absorbency is sure to provide endless comfort and protection all day or night. Boasting up to a 11,000ml capacity. Want to amp it up? Pop in an overnight booster, and you've got a whopping 13.5-liter cushion of coziness. We strongly recommend trying a sample of this diaper before purchasing in bulk, as we cannot offer refunds or returns for issues related to fit. For additional information regarding diapers and their features, click here to check out our Diaper Guide

reviews.author: Reyna
reviews.body: These are one of my favorite diapers, they hold super well and the leg area is stretchy enough not to loosen or break. The size is amazing and fit super well. They have a soft scent as well. Everything about this diapers is magical.

reviews.author: brian
reviews.body: These are one of my go-to diapers to wear while I'm out during the day and at work. I love the smell and the feel of them. It's fun to be able to see how full the diaper is, too, because of the transparent layer. It's a fun, cute, and comfortable design that you expect from the rearz brand. My girlfriend is also a big fan of this pattern when I wear it. She thinks it's really cute

reviews.author: AN
reviews.body:
These have been a comfortable, easy to use product. The double tabs help to ensure they stay securely in place while having a flexible mid band that stretches smoothly to ensure a secure bind. The diaper itself fits comfortably and I have never had a leak.  If I had any complaint it would be that sometimes the tabs can tear off if tugged too hard.

Beyond that, thank you Rearz for this!

rearz-daydreamer-adult-diapers-2xl.description_cn: Daydreamer 失禁纸尿裤现已推出 2XL 尺码！采用可伸缩魔术贴，提供极致的舒适和便利，是我们迄今为止最大尺码的一次性纸尿裤。飘入甜蜜梦乡，Daydreamer 让你的梦想成真。

rearz-daydreamer-diapers.name: Daydreamer Adult Diapers
rearz-daydreamer-diapers.description_en: Drift-off into bliss with the Daydreamer, make your fantasies into reality with these dreamy diapers. In a sky painted with shades of pink and blue, there's a special place where daydreams come true. Every little would look up and see the fluffy clouds in a dance, with rainbows curving, and paper airplanes taking a chance. Birds sing their melodies and kites zig-zag by, in this magical realm up so high. In the middle of this enchanting sight, there are six little mice ready to take flight. They are the Daydreamer Mice, each one unique: Amelia , brave and true, Scout , swift and keen, Finn , loving and playful, Brie , happy and fun, Skipper , the life of the party and last but not least Willow , the softest and shyest of all the mice. A super smooth, clear plastic backing, makes this the first diaper to have a natural wetness indicator. The more you use the product the more noticeable it gets. Perfect for those looking for a diaper that caregivers can instantly see when you're ready for a change. Comfort is king with the Daydreamer diapers, our thickest padding and highest absorbency is sure to delight even the littlest of littles. Boasting up to a 11,000ml capacity, this diaper has the potential to bring you to your knees. Want to amp it up? Pop in an overnight booster, and you've got a whopping 13.5-liter cushion of coziness. For additional information regarding diapers and their features, click here to check out our Diaper Guide

reviews.author: D. Smith
reviews.body: What a great diaper!  I bought these on a whim because I wanted to try something new, I wasn't disappointed.  These diapers are absorbent, comfortable, and cute.  Wearing them overnight is amazing, even though they are plastic, they are surprisingly breathable.  They don't make me sweat and they don't chafe.  They are the best overnight plastic diapers I have tried yet, so I highly recommend them for wearing anywhere and anytime.  The sizing is pretty spot on.  I am a 34in waste and bought the medium (30-40in) and the tabs were about where jeans pockets would be, so I would recommend using the lower half of the sizing chart for a proper fit. Thank you Rearz!

reviews.author: Mike S.
reviews.body: Love these diapers and the more you wet them the more noticeable they become love that there is no hiding what you have done in your diaper

reviews.author: Gary
reviews.body: This diaper is amazing for many reasons. The diaper fills evenly and clear front is neat so you can see the pee filling up. Finally messed it holds a lot and smells like powder when moisture is wicked up.

rearz-daydreamer-diapers.description_cn: 飘入甜蜜的梦境，让幻想在 Daydreamer 中成真。在一片粉蓝交织的天空中，有一个特别的地方，梦想在那里成真。蓬松的云朵翩翩起舞，彩虹和纸飞机冒险飞翔。六只小老鼠准备起飞——它们是 Daydreamer 老鼠。采用透明塑料背板，是首款具有天然湿感应功能的纸尿裤。

rearz-holiday-diaper-sticker-5-packs.name: Holiday Diaper Sticker - 5 Packs
rearz-holiday-diaper-sticker-5-packs.description_en: Get into the holiday spirit with our delightful Holiday Diaper Stickers! These fun and festive stickers are designed to instantly transform your adult diapers into a playful and seasonal statement. Each pack contains 5 festive stickers you can apply to any Rearz adult diaper.(Picture shows diaper on the Inspire+) Easy Application: Applying these stickers to your adult diaper is a breeze, ensuring that you can quickly add a touch of holiday magic to your everyday routine. Express Your Style: Whether you're celebrating at home or at festive gatherings, our Holiday Diaper Stickers allow you to express your personality and embrace the holiday spirit with flair. Perfect for Gifting: These sticker packs also make fantastic gifts for friends and loved ones who appreciate an added touch of fun to their adult diapers and joy during the holidays. Sticker Features: -Stickers are 24cm x 14cm ~ 9" x 5" -Each set comes with 5 matching stickers NO DIAPERS Included!

reviews.author: Darryl M.
reviews.body: These tapes are very easy to apply and allow me to continue my holiday tradition of Christmas diapers! Since you no longer offer the diapers, at least I can now make my own!

rearz-holiday-diaper-sticker-5-packs.description_cn: 用我们可爱的节日纸尿裤贴纸迎接节日气氛！这些有趣喜庆的贴纸可以瞬间把你的成人纸尿裤变成充满玩趣的季节性宣言。每包含 5 张不同设计的贴纸。

rearz-home-run-fontals.name: Home Run Frontals - Printable Custom Diaper Panel Stickers
rearz-home-run-fontals.model: Home Run Frontals - Printable Custom Diaper Panel Stickers
rearz-home-run-fontals.description_en: Your diaper. Your rules. Your design. Home Run Frontals let you customise any diaper and make it completely yours. Home Run Frontals are printable vinyl diaper frontal panels that let you customise the frontal tape area of any plastic-backed diaper at home. No special equipment, no hassle — just print on any inkjet/laser printer , peel, and apply. The front wings were super short which made it hard to get a good fit plus it made me feel less protected. If the front wings were longer than xl or even had stretchy wings to that would help. The inside cuffs were smaller compared to xl i think it's because the diaper doesn't go as high up as xl. At first i thought it was the cuffs were shorter but after a few diapers i realized the waistband upfront
was smaller. I am comparing this 2xl to the bedry nights xl in size. If these 2 things get fixed this would be a recommended daytime diaper.

rearz-large-diaper-pail-deodorizer-discs.description_en: The perfect solution for anyone looking to keep their adult diaper pail smelling fresh and clean. Whether you or a loved one is managing incontinence, it can be difficult to keep odors under control. That's why we've created our natural essential oil infused deodorizer disks to tackle this problem head-on. Each disk is specially formulated to neutralize any unwanted odors and leave a subtle, pleasant scent in its place. Using the disks is simple, just place one at the bottom of your diaper pail and replace it as needed. With regular use, the disks will keep your pail smelling fresh and clean, eliminating any embarrassment or stress caused by strong odors. Our deodorizer disks are not just effective but also easy to use, making managing adult incontinence more manageable and stress-free. With its added benefit of natural essential oils, it also give you peace of mind that the solution you're using is safe and toxin-free. Pack of 40 individually packaged large size discs. Perfect for diaper pails, trash cans, bathrooms, drawers, cars and more! Reduce unpleasant odors in any confined space that needs freshening up. To have the best deodorant effect, put the disc into a non-empty diaper pail. This allows for better circulation of the scent to control odours. Use one disc at a time and replace every 3-4 weeks or once a week for large pails. Gentle and fresh powder scent is nicer than the traditional citrus circles. Each disc is individually packaged for freshness. Non-hazardous and non-toxic. Keep out of reach of children and infants. *Photos may not match product packaging as packaging has been updated. Each disc is 7.5 cm in diameter.
